title: mace pvp overlay
description: Heavy weapons and bulky GUIs ruining your high-version combat? This Mace PvP overlay shrinks items and cleans your screen for the ultimate competitive edge.
body:
# mace pvp overlay
**Key Features:**
- Optimized Combat Gear: Crucial weapons and items like the Mace, Wind Charge, Swords, and Golden Apples are redesigned to look clean and professional without blocking your view.

- Minimalist Clear GUI: Say goodbye to dark, heavy inventory backgrounds. Enjoy a sleek, completely transparent menu layout with sharp, minimalist borders for ultimate inventory management.

- Performance-First Visuals: Lightweight and highly optimized textures that give you a premium competitive look without dropping a single FPS.

- Perfect for High-Version PvP: Specifically tailored for modern 1.21+ combat mechanics, including Crystal PvP, Mace PvP, and fast-paced shield tactics.

**Why use this pack?**

Are massive weapons and bulky screens messing up your timing? This custom Mace PvP overlay is built exactly for high-version competitive players. By transforming clutter into sleek, clean visuals, it keeps your eyes locked on the target so you never miss a critical mace smash or a perfect wind charge clutch.
